name: lexisrag
description: US Tax & Legal RAG System — BM25 + TF-IDF hybrid search with Gemini synthesis

scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Please use pnpm" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/legal-rag run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
